phases.objective: Complete read-only DB precheck evidence for KPIONE monthly transition without writes.
Close phase 016 evidence, reconcile roadmap authority, and transition governance to the Operating Model V2 roadmap.
Decide source grain, persisted grain, destination table or staging boundary, authoritative identity, idempotency behavior, correction/replay behavior, and readiness for runner construction.

phases.exit_gate: IDEMPOTENCY_CONTRACT_SELECTED is recorded. The old 016C readiness decision is absorbed into this exit gate.
phases.writes_allowed: Completed R2 repository architecture artifacts only; no DB access or SQL.
phases.authorization_required: No further 016B work is authorized after selection except review fixes inside the same PR.

phases.objective: Execute approved productive apply gate only if separately authorized.
phases.entry_gate: 017 readiness accepted and explicit productive apply authorization granted.
phases.exit_gate: Apply result, rollback readiness, and post-apply validation documented.
phases.writes_allowed: DB writes only if exact command, role, phase, rollback, and confirmation are authorized.

phases.objective: Post-apply correction, monitoring trial, and final transition decision.
phases.entry_gate: 018 apply completed or explicitly skipped with evidence.
phases.exit_gate: Trial outcome accepted; deferred retention/destructive topics may be reconsidered only after this phase.
phases.writes_allowed: Monitoring/evidence; destructive actions remain disallowed unless a new directive amendment exists.
phases.authorization_required: Explicit 019 prompt and any separate production authorization.

deviation_requires_directive_amendment.rule: Any deviation from the locked sequence, active phase, allowed next phase, deferred topics, or destructive-action ban requires an explicit amendment to this directive before work continues.

hard_restrictions: No Supabase access without separate authorization.
No SQL execution without separate authorization.
No DB reads or writes without separate authorization.
No app runtime modification in this reform.
No loader modification in this reform.
No further contracts 013-016 technical artifact modification without separate authorization.
No apply, cutover, or destructive action.
017 is the next permitted unit but is not authorized.

integrity_contract.line_ending_note: CRLF checkout bytes may produce a different SHA256 without semantic drift.

amendments.reason: PR #44 closed phase 016 evidence and hash reconciliation proved the previous SHA mismatch was line-ending-only, so 016A is redefined as legacy evidence closeout and governed transition readiness for separately authorized 016B.

hard restrictions updated to remove obsolete no-git actions for this authorized amendment while preserving productive bans
